summary: Content Engine Module (M1+M2) — Iteration 251. Comprehensive testing of AI-powered content production system. All 16 backend API tests passed. Frontend tests verified navigation, tabs, sources display, ideas generation, draft detail view, and queue management.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Content Engine fully functional. Demo user has admin role required for content endpoints. AI generation uses GPT-4o via emergentintegrations with fallback to static content if LLM unavailable.

stats_endpoint.returns: sources, ideas, drafts, queue_total, queue_approved counts

content_engine_page.stats_display: PASS - Shows 10 sorgenti, 6 idee, 1 bozze, 0 approvate

tabs.tab_switching: PASS - All tabs clickable and switch correctly

sources_tab.source_structure: PASS - Shows title, description, pain_points, type badge
sources_tab.genera_idee_button: PASS - Button present on each source card

ideas_tab.idea_structure: PASS - Shows format badge, hook, brief, target_audience
ideas_tab.crea_bozza_button: PASS - Button present on idea cards

drafts_tab.draft_structure: PASS - Shows title, body preview, format badge, hashtags
drafts_tab.draft_detail_view: PASS - Opens on click with full content

draft_detail.full_body: PASS - Shows complete content with sections
draft_detail.cta_section: PASS - CTA displayed in blue box

mocked_apis.note: AI generation uses GPT-4o via emergentintegrations. Fallback functions return static content if LLM unavailable.

features_verified: Navigation: 'Contenuti' link appears in sidebar for admin users
Sources tab: 10 sources displayed with title, description, pain_points
Sources tab: 'Genera Idee' button on each source card
Ideas tab: Ideas display with format badge, hook, brief, 'Crea Bozza' button
Drafts tab: Drafts display with title, body preview, hashtags, format badge
DraftDetail: Full body, CTA section, hashtags, 'Torna alle bozze' button
Queue tab: Shows editorial queue with status badges (Pubblicato)
Stats display: Header shows counts for sources, ideas, drafts, approved items
Tab navigation: All 4 tabs switch correctly
